scripts.dev:all: node -e "const { spawn } = require('child_process'); spawn('pnpm', ['--filter', '@workspace/api-server', 'run', 'dev'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); spawn('pnpm', ['--filter', '@workspace/dropflow', 'run', 'dev'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true });"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test && pnpm run test:e2e
